objective: Plan an exact embodied graph across micro, edge, and site profiles with prepare/commit-or-abort, local safety vetoes, fenced takeover, and non-live fault evidence.
falsifiable_claim: The same exact graph compiles across declared profiles and remains restart-unarmed, one-writer, locally vetoable, and fenced under simulation, SIL, HIL, and shadow faults.
dependencies: Frozen safety and embodied owner contracts
exit_criteria: One exact graph compiles across micro, edge, and site and prepare/commit-or-abort plus restart-unarmed invariants hold.
Simulation, SIL, HIL, and shadow fault matrices prove one writer, local veto and e-stop, fenced takeover, and safe rejoin.
Retained evidence log contains exactly one literal M11_EMBODIED_NONLIVE_GRAPH_PROOF_EXIT=0; process exit status alone is insufficient.
adversarial_or_fault_proof: Inject graph drift, stream mismatch, prepare timeout, commit split, restart, stale actuator lease, remote-veto attempt, e-stop, supervisor loss, takeover race, and unsafe rejoin.
remaining_nonclaims: No generic certification, live mission, remote final veto, federation, or stage closure claim.
source_provenance: Plan-level proposal derived from docs/architecture/_meta/work-items/m0-m14-plan-gap-audit.md at origin/master 69592149186cb29383a397ad0aa3ad6f5ab4ab7b; status transaction 2026-07-22.
